title: Sports
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: 2026 NFL Mock Draft: Who Lands Micah Parsons 2.0? Giants, Chiefs Grab Top WRs
items.description: Micah Parsons 2.0 might just be in this class. Who gets him? Not the Cowboys, who land a different defensive star in our latest mock draft.

items.title: 'Good Things Happening' as Mick Schumacher Preps for Rookie INDYCAR Season
items.description: Mick Schumacher's rookie season in INDYCAR is on the horizon, and he and his team are positive about all the good things that are unfolding.

items.title: 2026 NFL Offseason Buzz, Rumors: Jets, Titans Swap Johnson, Sweat
items.description: Here's the latest offseason buzz and rumors around the NFL.

items.title: College Football Offseason Buzz: Cincinnati Suing Former QB Brendan Sorsby
items.description: The college football news cycle never stops. With that in mind, here's a tracker of offseason buzz across the sport.

items.title: Best Sports Betting Apps 2026: Top Betting Sites Reviewed
items.description: Compare the best sports betting apps and sites for 2026. See reviews, bonuses, and features to help choose the right sportsbook for your needs.

items.title: Top CB prospect McCoy says knee's fully healthy
items.description: Former Vols CB Jermod McCoy says he is fully healed from a right ACL injury and expects to have "no limits" during his upcoming pro day at Tennessee.

items.title: Ranking the top offseason trade candidates: Who are the best players potentially available?
items.description: How do Brian Thomas Jr. and Maxx Crosby stack up on the trade market? We break down the latest intel.

items.title: Who will start at quarterback for the Vikings, Browns and Jets? We made QB1 predictions for all 32 teams
items.description: Will Kirk Cousins go back to Minnesota? Could Kyler Murray join the AFC? Let's predict who will start for every team in the 2026 season.

items.title: Sources: Johnson to Titans in latest Jets trade
items.description: The Jets are trading pass rusher Jermaine Johnson to the Titans for defensive tackle T'Vondre Sweat, sources told ESPN.

items.title: Source: Scherzer returning to Jays for 19th season
items.description: Three-time Cy Young Award winner Max Scherzer has agreed to return to the Blue Jays for his 19th season, a source confirmed to ESPN.
